title: Data Pipeline Path
description: Build fluency in Data Pipeline inside Data Processing by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Lambda Architecture
steps.summary: Lambda Architecture belongs to the Data Processing area of AI/ML, within Data Pipeline. It sits inside Data Processing / Data Pipeline. Compare it with ETL and Ragas pipeline. It opens into TD-lambda and Lambda Cloud.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.
